$description: Component tokens for the Avatar Profile Photo component, which displays large circular profile pictures with optional verified badges, placeholder icons, or text initials. Figma Reference: Node ID 26683-72284

states: Placeholder Icon: Shows user icon placeholder
features: Verified Badge: Optional blue checkmark badge
White Border: Consistent border around the avatar (12px for sm, 16px for md/lg)
Circular Shape: Full border radius for perfect circles

$usage: These tokens ensure consistency across user profile pages, account settings, large format avatar displays, verification badge positioning, and placeholder states.
$related: avatar.json: Standard avatar component (smaller sizes, different use cases)

placeholder.description: Background color for user icon placeholder

sm.description: Border radius for small avatar profile photo (90px)

md.description: Border radius for medium avatar profile photo (144px)

lg.description: Border radius for large avatar profile photo (346px)

sm.description: Border width for small avatar profile photo (12px)

md.description: Border width for medium avatar profile photo (16px)

lg.description: Border width for large avatar profile photo (16px)

color.description: White border color around avatar profile photo

sm.description: Size for small avatar profile photo (90px)

md.description: Size for medium avatar profile photo (144px)

lg.description: Size for large avatar profile photo (346px)

sm.description: Typography for small size initials (30px Display Medium)

md.description: Typography for medium size initials (36px Display Medium)

lg.description: Typography for large size initials (60px Display Medium)

placeholder-icon.$comment: User icon placeholder when no photo is available

sm.description: Icon size for small avatar profile photo (54px)

md.description: Icon size for medium avatar profile photo (96px)

lg.description: Icon size for large avatar profile photo (266px)

position.$comment: Positioning offsets to center placeholder icon within container

x.description: X position for placeholder icon in small size

y.description: Y position for placeholder icon in small size

x.description: X position for placeholder icon in medium size

y.description: Y position for placeholder icon in medium size

x.description: X position for placeholder icon in large size

y.description: Y position for placeholder icon in large size

verified-tick.$comment: Optional blue checkmark badge positioned at bottom-right corner

sm.description: Size of verified tick badge for small avatar (20px)

md.description: Size of verified tick badge for medium avatar (24px)

lg.description: Size of verified tick badge for large avatar (32px)

bottom.description: Bottom position for verified tick in small size (0px from edge)

right.description: Right position for verified tick in small size (0px from edge)

bottom.description: Bottom position for verified tick in medium size (2px from edge)

right.description: Right position for verified tick in medium size (2px from edge)

bottom.description: Bottom position for verified tick in large size (4px from edge)

right.description: Right position for verified tick in large size (4px from edge)

image.$comment: CSS properties for profile photo image display

fit.description: Object fit for profile photo image (fills container while maintaining aspect ratio)

position.description: Object position for profile photo image
